status: M1 RBAC track merged; M1 remainder (PR-B/C/D) and DEFER A-G pending

M0.notes: Authentication and authorization gate normalized. SEC-1..SEC-4 resolved. T-M0-10 ops verification PASS (Hydra introspection + valid JWT -> /api/v1/me 200).

M1.notes: RBAC track (PR-A SEC-5 + PR-F ADR-0002 + PR-G1..G6) merged via PR #20-23, #29-31, #27, #28. SEC-5, RBAC model unification (4-boolean), domain + migration + store + handlers + cache + frontend integration all live on main. Codex review FIX A-D applied. Remaining T-M1-02/03/04/05/07/08 (envelope, types split, cmd lifecycle, audit actor, ws envelope, auth_test) tracked as PR-B/C/D in work_backlog.md.

frontend.auth: /login redirects to Hydra OIDC authorize; /auth/callback handler still pending (M2 follow-up)
frontend.rbac: PermissionEditor wired to /api/v1/rbac/policies (PR #27). RbacError type carries contract code. Audit invariant locked in UI via PermissionMatrix.lockedCells.

backend.auth: BearerTokenVerifier (Hydra introspection) + enforceRoutePermission middleware (route mapping table + PermissionCache). M0 requireMinRole removed from production paths.
backend.test_check: PASS (go test ./... including domain/rbac, store/rbac, httpapi/permissions, httpapi/rbac handlers)
backend.rbac: rbac_policies table seeded with developer/manager/system_admin per section 12.1 default. users.role now FK to rbac_policies. Custom roles supported via POST /api/v1/rbac/policies.

infra_idp.scaffold: infra/idp/ (hydra.yaml, kratos.yaml, identity schema, scripts, sql) verified end-to-end in 2026-05-08 sandbox

feat(rbac): RBAC handlers (M1 PR-G4 + FIX-B + FIX-C)
feat(frontend): RBAC PermissionEditor ↔ backend (M1 PR-G6 + FIX-D)
